mnemonics: CLUMP-D: Clustering, Latent Variable Models, Unsupervised, Manifold Learning, Dimensionality Reduction
keyPoints: Unsupervised learning finds hidden patterns in unlabeled data
Clustering groups similar data points together
Dimensionality reduction simplifies data while preserving its structure
commonMistakes: Assuming clusters correspond to real-world categories without validation
Using dimensionality reduction without considering information loss
Applying Euclidean distance metrics to data with non-Euclidean structure
